# simulate_admixture { #tspaint.simulate_admixture }

```python
tspaint.simulate_admixture(
    n_admix=10,
    n_ref=10,
    sequence_length=1000000.0,
    recombination_rate=1e-08,
    ploidy=2,
    random_seed=42,
    **demography_kwargs,
)
```

Simulate an admixed sample plus two reference panels.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**n_admix**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [10]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of admixed individuals (query haplotypes).

<code>[**n_ref**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [10]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Number of individuals sampled from each reference source (A and B).

<code>[**sequence_length**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1000000.0]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Length of the simulated sequence in base pairs.

<code>[**recombination_rate**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-08]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Per-base, per-generation recombination rate.

<code>[**ploidy**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [2]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Ploidy; each individual yields ``ploidy`` sample haplotypes.

<code>[**random_seed**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[int](`int`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [42]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Seed for :func:`msprime.sim_ancestry`.

<code>[****demography_kwargs**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} []{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [{}]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Passed to :func:`admixture_demography` (e.g. ``T_admix``, ``T_split``, ``f_A``, ``Ne``).

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Tree sequence whose sample nodes are haplotypes; the first ``ploidy * n_admix`` belong to the admixed population (queries), the rest to the two reference sources.

## See Also {.doc-section .doc-section-see-also}

local_ancestry_truth : Recover the ground-truth ancestry tracts.

## Examples {.doc-section .doc-section-examples}

```python
>>> ts = simulate_admixture(n_admix=5, n_ref=5, sequence_length=1e5,
...                         random_seed=1)
>>> ts.num_samples
30
```
